spoiler_tiers.label: King's Landing
spoiler_tiers.description: The game begins. Ned Stark arrives.

spoiler_tiers.label: War of Five Kings
spoiler_tiers.description: The realm fractures. Blood on every throne.

spoiler_tiers.label: House of the Dragon
spoiler_tiers.description: 170 years before. The Targaryen civil war. House of the Dragon seasons 1-2.

spoiler_tiers.label: Dany Arrives in Westeros
spoiler_tiers.description: Dragons come west. The final war begins.

spoiler_tiers.label: Everything
spoiler_tiers.description: All books, Fire and Blood, The World of Ice and Fire.

canon_sources.label: A Song of Ice and Fire (Martin)
canon_sources.description: The five published novels. Primary canon.

canon_sources.label: Fire & Blood
canon_sources.description: History of House Targaryen. The Dance of the Dragons.

canon_sources.label: The World of Ice and Fire
canon_sources.description: Illustrated history. Deep worldbuilding and lore.

canon_sources.label: Dunk and Egg (Tales of Dunk and Egg)
canon_sources.description: The hedge knight novellas. Ser Duncan the Tall and young Aegon V, 90 years before the main story.

canon_sources.label: GoT Show Seasons 1–4
canon_sources.description: Largely faithful to the books with compression. Always labeled.

canon_sources.label: GoT Show Seasons 5–8
canon_sources.description: Diverges significantly from books. Always labeled. Not book canon.

canon_sources.label: House of the Dragon Seasons 1–2
canon_sources.description: HBO adaptation of Fire & Blood. The Dance of the Dragons, 170 years before GoT.

canon_sources.label: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms (Show)
canon_sources.description: HBO adaptation of Dunk and Egg. Ser Duncan and young Egg, 90 years before the main story.
